title: Traditional Middle Eastern Cornmeal Pancakes (Maqluba)
description: A traditional Middle Eastern dish made with cornmeal, tender and fluffy, perfect as a snack or light meal. Maqluba is a popular dish in the Middle East and is often served with a variety of toppings.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, flour, eggs, milk, salt, and maqluba spice mix.
2. Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
3. Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the pan.
4. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
5. Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
6. Serve warm with your choice of toppings.
